message:
🌱 Add kpt: Provide a way to ignore files or directories mission (#814)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kpt-517-provide-a-way-to-ignore-files-or-directories",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kpt: Provide a way to ignore files or directories",
+    "description": "Provide a way to ignore files or directories. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kpt deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kpt version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kpt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kpt\nhelm list -n kpt 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kpt installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kpt configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kpt configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kpt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kpt\nkubectl get configmap -n kpt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kpt\n```\nWe have legacy helm/ directories in our project that cause kpt parsing errors due to Go templates in the yaml files.\n\nWe'd like to be able to tell Kpt to ignore sub-directories."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Provide a way to ignore files or directories",
+        "description": "Hi,\nLet me add few more cases\n\n1. `kpt pkg get` will download ALL files in the repository. This is not cool at all.\ne.g. I may have my IDE files inside, some scripts, Makefiles, Markdown, etc.\nWA: move Kptfile and everything to separate folder and don't put there any other resources.\nThis doesn't\n```yaml\nkind: PodChaos\napiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1\nmetadata:\n  namespace: $(params.namespace)\n  name: pod-kill\nspec:\n  selector:\n    namespaces:\n      - $(params.namespace)\n    labelSelectors:\n      app.kubernetes.io/component: master\n      app.kubernetes.io/name: redis\n  mode: one\n  action: pod-kill\n  gracePeriod: 0\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kpt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kpt\nkubectl get events -n kpt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Provide a way to ignore files or directories\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi,\nLet me add few more cases\n\n1. `kpt pkg get` will download ALL files in the repository. This is not cool at all.\ne.g. I may have my IDE files inside, some scripts, Makefiles, Markdown, etc.\nWA: move Kptfile and everything to separate folder and don't put there any other resources.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kind: PodChaos\napiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1\nmetadata:\n  namespace: $(params.namespace)\n  name: pod-kill\nspec:\n  selector:\n    namespaces:\n      - $(params.namespace)\n    labelSelectors:\n      app.kubernetes.io/component: master\n      app.kubernetes.io/name: redis\n  mode: one\n  action: pod-kill\n  gracePeriod: 0",
+        "apiVersion: kpt.dev/v1\nkind: Kptfile\nmetadata:\n  name: example\npipeline:\n  pkg:\n    - function: ignore\n      configMap:\n        resources:\n          - '*.iml'\n          - '*.idea'\n          - 'Makefile'",
+        "apiVersion: kpt.dev/v1\nkind: Kptfile\nmetadata:\n  name: example\npipeline:\n  live:\n    - image: gcr.io/kpt-fn/ignore\n      configMap:\n        group: chaos-mesh.org"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kpt",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kpt"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kptdev/kpt/issues/517",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kptdev/kpt"
+    },
+    "reactions": 16,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kpt installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:37:36.060Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
